concepts.title: Mordell–Weil theorem
concepts.blurb: E(Q) is finitely generated: E(Q) ≅ Z^r ⊕ E(Q)_tors. The rank r is a deep invariant; the torsion is tame (Mazur).

concepts.title: Birch–Swinnerton-Dyer heuristic
concepts.blurb: Numerical origin of BSD: ∏_{p≤X} N_p/p ≈ c·(log X)^r for the true rank r. Curves of higher rank have more points modulo p on average.

concepts.title: BSD rank equality
concepts.blurb: The conjecture: ord_{s=1} L(E, s) = rank E(Q). Sharper form predicts the leading Taylor coefficient in terms of regulator, Sha, periods, torsion.
